response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, seasoned generalist with nearly two decades of experience, genuine low-latency distributed-systems work at Sociomantic, and current AI-tooling exposure that matches a preferred qualification. However, the role is a Principal IC6 specializing in growth and experimentation systems, and the resume shows no experimentation platform, feature-flagging, A/B testing, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis experience — the core of this job. There is also little evidence of principal-level scope: most roles are senior IC positions at small companies rather than multi-workstream initiatives enabling many teams at enterprise scale.
strengths: 19+ years of engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded, well above the 8-year bar
Proven high-scale production work: low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Hands-on with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, plus strong open-source and mentoring track record
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, metrics, or telemetry platform experience anywhere on the resume
No demonstrated principal-level, multi-team architectural leadership at enterprise scale
Career centered on product feature work at small companies rather than growth or measurement systems

key_factors.factor: Scope gap versus Principal IC6 expectations
Strong engineering fundamentals and scale experience
